name: Pirate King's Cutlass
description: Notes The Cutlass is a very strong DPS sword, though it has been power crept over time. Not taking status effects into account, it beats the T12 Sword of Acclaim up to 126/101/95 DEF and the T13 Sword of Splendor until 26/21/20 DEF. It is always outdamaged by the T14 Sword of Majesty.
